title: Chevaliera cariocae
taxonomy: Chevaliera cariocae belongs to the family Lamiaceae. This plant is a species of flowering plant. Its classification also includes the genus Chevaliera. Further classification includes the kingdom Plantae and the class Magnoliopsida. Chevaliera cariocae is native to the southeastern region of Brazil.
